SELECT 
  u.id as user_id,
  u.email,
  u.role,
  u.tenant_id,
  t.id as tenant_id_real,
  t.name as tenant_name,
  t.email as tenant_email
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN tenants t ON t.id = u.tenant_id
WHERE u.email = ''3ws@3ws.com'';
")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
fix(frontends): standardize VITE_API_BASE across all frontends

Changed all frontends to use VITE_API_BASE (without /api) and add /api in code.
This prevents the /api/api duplication bug in frontend-internal.

Changes:
- frontend-internal/src/api/httpClient.ts: Use VITE_API_BASE
- frontend-client/src/config/api.ts: Use VITE_API_BASE + /api
- frontend-driver/src/config/api.ts: Use VITE_API_BASE + /api
- frontend-partner/src/config/api.ts: Use VITE_API_BASE

All frontends now follow the same pattern:
const API_BASE_URL = import.meta.env.VITE_API_BASE || ''http://localhost:3000'';
baseURL: ${API_BASE_URL}/api

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
